symbols.name: run
symbols.docstring: Run command, return stdout. Raises RuntimeError on failure if check=True.

symbols.name: run_visible
symbols.docstring: Run command with output shown to user.

symbols.name: detect_compose
symbols.docstring: Detect docker compose v2 plugin or docker-compose v1 standalone.

symbols.name: wait_docker
symbols.docstring: Wait for Docker daemon; try to auto-start it.

symbols.name: ensure_env_local
symbols.docstring: Create .env.local from example if missing.

symbols.name: ensure_env_prod
symbols.docstring: Ensure .env.prod exists for production.

symbols.name: start_admin
symbols.docstring: Start the Vite dev server as a background process.

symbols.name: ensure_mobile_env
symbols.docstring: Write apps/mobile/.env with the machine's LAN IP for Expo dev.

symbols.name: generate_mosque_bundle
symbols.docstring: Merge /data/mosques/**/*.json into the mobile app's bundled asset.

symbols.name: _check_android_prerequisites
symbols.docstring: Upfront checks for Node, npm, Java, and Android SDK before any build work.

symbols.name: _patch_expo_modules_core_gradle
symbols.docstring:
Fix MissingPropertyException for 'components.release' in ExpoModulesCorePlugin.gradle.
AGP 8.3 (used by React Native 0.74) registers the release SoftwareComponent later
in the lifecycle than AGP 8.1,

symbols.name: _patch_gradle_wrapper
symbols.docstring:
Pin Gradle wrapper to exactly 8.7.
- Gradle â‰¤8.6 ships with ASM 9.5 which crashes on kotlin-compiler-embeddable
  1.9.24 class files (ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException in ClassReader).
- Gradle 8.7 shi

symbols.name: _patch_ndk_version
symbols.docstring:
On Windows, downgrade NDK 26.1.10909125 â†’ 25.1.8937393.

NDK 26.1 ships with a broken ld.lld.exe on Windows that fails with
'Unknown error (0xC1)' when linking any C/C++ code (e.g. expo-av,
expo-mod

symbols.name: _preflight_check_settings_gradle
symbols.docstring:
Scan settings.gradle for includeBuild entries and verify each path exists.
Emits clear diagnostics so the cause of 'Included build does not exist' errors
is visible before Gradle even starts.

symbols.name: _ensure_cleartext_traffic
symbols.docstring: Patch AndroidManifest.xml to allow plain HTTP for local dev.

symbols.name: cmd_android
symbols.docstring: Build Android APK for the mobile app.

symbols.name: _read_env_value
symbols.docstring: Read a single key from a .env file.

symbols.name: _make_png
symbols.docstring:
Generate a minimal valid RGBA PNG.
pixels: callable(x, y) -> (r, g, b, a) tuple
symbols.signature: def _make_png(width: int, height: int, pixels) -> bytes

symbols.name: _splash_pixel

symbols.name: build_iqama_times
